subcodes.first_line: Every stone and clod hath voiced that which the Book hath uttered, yet the people remain in doubt and dissension when it is raised [3.5s]... ...Among the people are those who said:  `He hath repudiated the divines.'  Say:  `Yea, by My Lord!  I, in very truth, was the One Who abolished the idols!
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق کل حجر و مدر بما نطق به الکتاب ولکن القوم فی مریه و شقاق اذا ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
